title: Navy Blue Grosgrain Ribbon 25mm X 10 Meters (Navy Blue) Perfect for for Gifts Wrap Sew Party, Decorations Events Dress Wedding Christmas Crafts, Bows Car, Floral Balloons Hairs, DIY, Bouquets, Cake
features: Navy Blue Grosgrain Ribbon Top quality- 10 Metres - Double Sided, Size: 25mm, 2.5cm, 1" inch Wide, Brand New , Woven Edge

This Navy Blue Grosgrain ribbon is made high-quality 100% polyester; ribbed patterned grosgrain ribbon is durable and reusable. You can easily cut to the appropriate length according to your personal needs.
Grosgrain ribbons of bright color, not easy to fade, is a good material for DIY production, also it can make you enjoy the fun and pleasure in the DIY process with your friends or family.

It can be used to decorate different occasions, such as bridal gifts, weddings, Christmas, Halloween, parties, birthdays, festivals and celebrations. It can also be used to package bouquets, garlands, flowers, wine bottle baskets, wrapping gifts, etc.
Party Favours and Arts and Crafts, Good Quality Many Colours - Double Sided For All Craft & Design Needs Wedding & Celebrations Reels of Grosgain Ribbon
description: Ideal for use in: Decorations, Dummy Clips, Wedding Stationary, Bookmarks, Card Making, Favours, Clothes, and many many other uses
